race.comment: LAUREL HILL (1) was racing well in Sydney then travelled to Newcastle last start and performed poorly over this trip in a BM68. Finds an easier assignment today and jumps from a far better gate so a return to form is on the cards at lucrative odds. OCEAN ALPS (5) ran a nice race in open company over this distance at the Gold Coast two back then put in a shocker at Ipswich last time. Trialled satisfactorily since. Best form stacks up so give her another chance. LADY LUCIFER (2) travelled in front and defied all challengers at her latest appearance over 1350m at Doomben in a BM70. Loves this trip and there is further improvement to come at just the third run of the prep. HELLCIBELL (7) dropped right out at Tamworth last start but might be looking for 1400m at this stage. HULU (3) has an enviable record at this distance and is in the mix off a five-week freshen up.
